name: arctic_wolf_aurora_endpoint_security
explanation: Arctic Wolf Aurora Endpoint Security is a logs-only marketplace tile. The spec defines only a `logs` template (TCP/UDP syslog listener with a user-chosen port) and there is no Agent check class — the `datadog_checks/arctic_wolf_aurora_endpoint_security/` package contains only `__init__.py`, `__about__.py`, and an empty `data/` directory, with no `<name>.py` and no metrics implementation. There is no upstream service to probe; the integration's purpose is to receive forwarded events at a port the user picks. Auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply (pattern N: instrumentation-only).
notes: Marketplace logs-only tile, no check.py. Same shape as the tenable analysis.
